task_completion.description: Create a BaseCamp List named 'Presentation Map'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BaseCamp application's left sidebar (Library/My Collection) shows a newly created list explicitly named 'Presentation Map'.

task_completion.description: Include only the track/route from the 'fells_loop' dataset in the new list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Presentation Map' list is selected, and its contents pane shows the item from the 'fells_loop' dataset. No other unrelated tracks or waypoints should be in this specific list.

task_completion.description: Set the track color to Red
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties dialog for the track/route shows the color set to Red, or the track/route is clearly visible as a red line on the main map view.

task_completion.description: Ensure only the 'Presentation Map' list is visible on the map
task_completion.visual_evidence: Other lists or folders in the sidebar are unselected or hidden, and the main map view displays ONLY the red fells_loop track without clutter from other datasets.
A screenshot tool or BaseCamp's save/print dialog is visible, saving an image file specifically to the path 'C:\workspace\output\clean_map.png'.

task_completion.description: Export the list as a GPX file to 'C:\workspace\output\presentation_map.gpx'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The BaseCamp 'Export' dialog is open, showing the 'Presentation Map' list being saved as a GPX file to the path 'C:\workspace\output\presentation_map.gpx'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to manipulate the map and lists.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Garmin BaseCamp application open and being actively clicked/navigated, rather than the agent using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The GPX file was exported using the application's export feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The BaseCamp 'File -> Export' menu or dialog is used, rather than the agent manually typing XML/GPX data into a text editor.

integrity.description: The screenshot captures the actual map view with the track.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot saving process captures the actual BaseCamp map interface showing the red track, not a blank window or a downloaded image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected GPX export path: 'C:\workspace\output\presentation_map.gpx'. Expected screenshot path: 'C:\workspace\output\clean_map.png'. Expected track color: Red. Note: The source file 'fells_loop.gpx' may actually contain a route instead of a track due to a dataset quirk; accept the route being colored red and isolated if the agent adapts to this.
